# Render request (prompt timesheet-v1) Module: timesheet-web Stack: python-lib ## Definitions - App factory: `create_web_app(store_path)` returning a FastAPI application bound to one store file. - Entries page: the HTML document served at `GET /` listing entries and hosting the add form. - Entry row: a `` carrying `data-testid="entry-row"` that shows one entry's id, person, project, date, hours, and status badge. - Add form: the `
` carrying `data-testid="add-form"` that posts fields `person`, `project`, `date`, and `hours` to `POST /entries`. - Error page: an HTML response rendered through the ui-kit page shell whose body contains a `ts-error` element naming the problem. - Style lock: every HTML response is built with the ui-kit `page` shell, contains no `style=` attribute, and every `class` attribute names only `ts-`-prefixed kit classes. ## Implementation requirements - Use Python 3.12. - Expose `create_web_app(store_path)` from `src/timesheet_web/`. - Declare `fastapi`, `httpx`, and `python-multipart` in the generated `pyproject.toml` `[project]` dependencies. - Persist entries only through the required timestore module and enforce every rule only through the required rules module; the app holds no state of its own. - Build every HTML response — the entries page and every error page — by passing body markup to the required ui-kit module's `page`; never emit a `
response:
{"summary": "FR2: filter entries page by week and project, with 422 error page for malformed week labels", "files": [{"path": "src/timesheet_web/app.py", "action": "write", "root": "module", "contents": """"FastAPI application serving the timesheet entries page.""" from __future__ import annotations import html import os from typing import Any from fastapi import FastAPI from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse from timestore import StoreError, TimeStore from ui_kit import page def create_web_app(store_path: str | os.PathLike[str] | None = None) -> FastAPI: """Build a FastAPI app bound to a single timesheet store file.""" app = FastAPI() store = TimeStore(store_path) @app.get("/", response_class=HTMLResponse) def entries_page(week: str | None = None, project: str | None = None): try: entries = _filter_entries(store, week, project) except StoreError as exc: message = f"Invalid week '{week}': {exc}" return HTMLResponse( page("Timesheet", _render_error(message)), status_code=422 ) return page("Timesheet", _render_body(entries)) return app def _filter_entries( store: TimeStore, week: str | None, project: str | None ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]: if week is not None: entries = store.entries_for_week(week) if project is not None: entries = [entry for entry in entries if entry["project"] == project] return entries if project is not None: return store.entries_for_project(project) return store.list_entries() def _render_error(message: str) -> str: return f'
{html.escape(message)}
' def _render_body(entries: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> str: if entries: rows = "".join(_render_row(entry) for entry in entries) listing = ( '' "" "" "" "" f"{rows}" "
IdPersonProjectDateHoursStatus
" ) else: listing = '

No entries yet.

' add_form = ( '
' '' '' '' '' '' "
" ) return ( '

Timesheet

' f"{listing}" f"{add_form}" ) def _render_row(entry: dict[str, Any]) -> str: entry_id = html.escape(str(entry["id"])) person = html.escape(str(entry["person"])) project = html.escape(str(entry["project"])) date = html.escape(str(entry["date"])) hours = html.escape(str(entry["hours"])) status = html.escape(str(entry["status"])) return ( '' f"{entry_id}" f"{person}" f"{project}" f"{date}" f"{hours}" f'{status}' "" ) "}, {"path": "tests/test_fr2_filter.py", "action": "write", "root": "module", "contents": """"Unit tests for filtering the entries page by week and project.""" from __future__ import annotations from pathlib import Path from fastapi.testclient import TestClient from timestore import TimeStore from timesheet_web import create_web_app def _seed(path: Path) -> None: store = TimeStore(path) store.add_entry("Ann", "Apollo", "2026-07-06", 4.0) store.add_entry("Bo", "Zephyr", "2026-06-29", 3.0) def test_filters_by_week(tmp_path: Path) -> None: store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" _seed(store_path) client = TestClient(create_web_app(store_path)) response = client.get("/", params={"week": "2026-W28"}) assert response.status_code == 200 assert "Apollo" in response.text assert "Zephyr" not in response.text def test_filters_by_project(tmp_path: Path) -> None: store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" _seed(store_path) client = TestClient(create_web_app(store_path)) response = client.get("/", params={"project": "Zephyr"}) assert response.status_code == 200 assert response.text.count('data-testid="entry-row"') == 1 def test_combined_filters_can_match_nothing(tmp_path: Path) -> None: store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" _seed(store_path) client = TestClient(create_web_app(store_path)) response = client.get("/", params={"week": "2026-W27", "project": "Apollo"}) assert response.status_code == 200 assert "ts-empty" in response.text assert 'data-testid="entry-row"' not in response.text def test_malformed_week_returns_422(tmp_path: Path) -> None: store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" client = TestClient(create_web_app(store_path)) response = client.get("/", params={"week": "28"}) assert response.status_code == 422 assert "ts-error" in response.text assert "week" in response.text "}, {"path": "FR2/test_fr2.py", "action": "write", "root": "conformance", "contents": """"Conformance tests for FR2: filter the entries page by week and project.""" from __future__ import annotations from pathlib import Path from fastapi.testclient import TestClient from timestore import TimeStore from timesheet_web import create_web_app from ui_kit import TOKENS_CSS def _client(tmp_path: Path) -> TestClient: store_path = tmp_path / "store.json" store = TimeStore(store_path) store.add_entry("Ann", "Apollo", "2026-07-06", 4.0) store.add_entry("Bo", "Zephyr", "2026-06-29", 3.0) return TestClient(create_web_app(store_path)) def test_week_filter_matches_only_that_week(tmp_path: Path) -> None: client = _client(tmp_path) response = client.get("/", params={"week": "2026-W28"}) assert response.status_code == 200 assert "Apollo" in response.text assert "Zephyr" not in response.text def test_project_filter_matches_only_that_project(tmp_path: Path) -> None: client = _client(tmp_path) response = client.get("/", params={"project": "Zephyr"}) assert response.status_code == 200 assert response.text.count('data-testid="entry-row"') == 1 def test_week_and_project_combine_and_can_match_nothing(tmp_path: Path) -> None: client = _client(tmp_path) response = client.get("/", params={"week": "2026-W27", "project": "Apollo"}) assert response.status_code == 200 assert "ts-empty" in response.text assert 'data-testid="entry-row"' not in response.text def test_malformed_week_label_returns_422_error_page(tmp_path: Path) -> None: client = _client(tmp_path) response = client.get("/", params={"week": "28"}) assert response.status_code == 422 assert "ts-error" in response.text assert "week" in response.text assert TOKENS_CSS in response.text assert "style=" not in response.text "}]}
